strategy_summary: Eyes of the flesh fly detect polarized light via dorsal ommatidia and dorsal ocelli. The flesh fly uses both dorsal ommatidia and dorsal ocelli to sense polarized light.
mechanism:
Eyes of the flesh fly detect polarized light via dorsal ommatidia and dorsal ocelli.

The flesh fly uses both dorsal ommatidia and dorsal ocelli to sense polarized light. (Shuker 2001:48)
function_addressed: sense light (visible spectrum) from the environment
